ui_response.ui_state: Gamma showed '생성' page with prompt '한글날'. Outline displayed '1' (empty placeholder) with no content generated. No error dialog, toast, or warning message visible to user. Identical to Build #6 UI behavior.

network_analysis.eventstream_tab: EMPTY — no SSE events parsed by DevTools
network_analysis.response_tab: Nothing to preview — This request has no response data available
network_analysis.response_body_note: Etap returned 200 OK with correct SSE headers (text/event-stream; charset=utf-8) and CORS headers, but the response body contained NO SSE events. DevTools shows both EventStream tab (empty) and Response tab (no data).

key_errors: POST https://ai.api.gamma.app/ai/v2/generation net::ERR_ABORTED 403 (Forbidden) — likely residual from Build #6 test
[PromptAndOutlineSettings] error generating outline: Unable to complete request — triggered by empty SSE response
net::ERR_CONNECTION_RESET on LaunchDarkly clientstream — unrelated feature flag service
console_analysis.interpretation: Gamma frontend received 200 OK but found no parseable SSE events in the body. It logged 'error generating outline: Unable to complete request' and silently failed.

gamma_specific.interaction_model: NOT bubble chat — user enters topic, Gamma generates outline then slides
gamma_specific.note: Gamma is fundamentally different from chat-based AI services. Warning delivery must account for its presentation generation workflow.

diagnosis.pattern: Etap returned 200 OK with correct SSE headers (text/event-stream; charset=utf-8, CORS, no-cache) but EMPTY body. Gamma frontend got a 'successful' HTTP response but found no SSE events to parse, resulting in silent failure.
diagnosis.comparison_with_build6: Build #6: 403 Forbidden → Gamma caught error internally, showed empty outline. Build #8: 200 OK + SSE headers but empty body → same visual result (empty outline), but different error path — frontend treats it as successful request with no data rather than error.
action_needed: SSE headers are CORRECT — Etap successfully returns text/event-stream with proper CORS
CRITICAL: Response body needs actual SSE event data
Must include at least one SSE event with outline data for Gamma to render
Example SSE body needed: 'data: {"type":"outline","cards":[{"title":"Warning","content":"⚠️ 민감정보 차단"}]}\n\n'
The generator must write SSE-formatted lines into the response body, not just set headers
